Home.heroTitle: Harmony between strategy, design, and code.
Home.heroLead: We build a digital presence that works: marketing that performs, sites that convert, and stores that scale.
Home.servicesIntro: Three pillars for your growth — visuals can be refined in Phase 2 with your design handoff.
Home.svcMarketingBody: Campaigns, content, and analytics aligned with business goals.
Home.svcWebBody: Fast, accessible, SEO‑friendly sites that represent your brand.
Home.svcShopBody: E‑commerce from catalog to checkout — clear for customers, simple for you.
Home.ctaBandBody: Send an inquiry — we’ll reply with clear next steps.

Services.title: Services
Services.intro: From strategy to launch — we stay with you across the full lifecycle.
Services.marketingLead: Reach the right audience and measure what works.
Services.marketingBullets: SEO and technical optimization|Paid channels and remarketing|Content and social|Reporting and continuous improvement
Services.webLead: Interfaces people enjoy and code engineers can maintain.
Services.webBullets: Next.js and a modern stack|Accessibility (a11y) and performance|Responsive layouts|Integrations (CRM, analytics, newsletter)
Services.shopLead: From first click to order confirmation — less friction, more conversions.
Services.shopBullets: Catalog, cart, payments|Orders and inventory basics|Scalable architecture|Ready for Phase 2 visual identity

About.title: About
About.lead: Harmony is a digital agency that connects marketing, design, and implementation.
About.body1: We believe great digital products must be clear for users, feasible for teams, and measurable for the business. We work in short cycles with transparent communication.
About.body2: The name Harmony hints at balance — like an accordion expanding and contracting, we widen your reach and sharpen your message when it matters.
About.placeholder: Team photos and case studies coming soon.
